# SQLite (vendored)

The SQLite amalgamation, compiled into PlumeServer's SQL adapter so no system
SQLite is needed.

- Version: 3.53.3 (`sqlite-amalgamation-3530300`)
- Source: https://www.sqlite.org/2026/sqlite-amalgamation-3530300.zip
- Licence: public domain (https://www.sqlite.org/copyright.html)

To update: download the newer amalgamation zip, replace `sqlite3.c` and
`include/sqlite3.h`, and update the version and URL above.
